desc: Places vertical drop pipes with intelligent positioning.
summary: Places vertical drop pipes with intelligent positioning. ONE CLICK determines location: detects nearest wall via DetectWall, auto-detects ceiling void centre via CalculateMiddleOfVoid, drops to 200 mm above floor, then starts horizontal drawing. Uses DistanceBetweenServicesCalculator for MPL spacing. Related: MultiServiceDrawerCommand for full interactive draw workflow.
usecase: User wants to place service drops near a wall and immediately draw horizontally. User wants one-click intelligent drop placement with void detection.
notfor: Drawing horizontal pipes only (use MultiServiceDrawerCommand). Not for AI without useDefaults=true.
precondition: Active document with a plan view. At least one PipingSystemType must exist. Ceiling and slab elements should be present for auto-detect to work.
postcondition: Vertical drop pipes created at the click point with MPL spacing. Horizontal pipes drawn from drop endpoints along user-picked path.

outputs.name: CreatedDrops
outputs.description: Number of vertical drop pipes created

preprompts: Placing service drops at the selected point...
Setting up vertical drops with intelligent positioning...
thinkingsteps: Detecting nearest wall for offset direction...
Creating vertical drop pipes with MPL spacing...
Starting horizontal pipe drawing from drop endpoints...
successprompts: Placed {CreatedDrops} drops and drew horizontal pipes.
Drops placed successfully — horizontal drawing started.
